title: In-house Café Barista
description:
Job Purpose

The Café Barista is responsible for delivering exceptional coffee quality to the Bank staff and guests, operating a low-volume premium café menu. This role also leads and supports a team of café support associates with special needs, providing structured guidance and hands-on training to build skills in a safe, inclusive work environment.

Key Responsibilities

Coffee Quality & Craft

•       Prepare espresso-based drinks to high sensory and consistency standards

•       Perform daily taste and quality checks

•       Maintain espresso machines, grinders, and other café equipment in clean and operational condition

•       Ensure all drinks meet premium standards, consistently

Café Operations

•       Serve a curated menu of up to 10 drinks, ensuring efficiency and precision

•       Manage service flow during peak office hours

•       Oversee stock management (coffee beans, milk, snacks, and consumables)

•       Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and presentation of café area

Inclusive Team Leadership

•       Supervise café associates during service and ensure safe, structured work

•       Assign simple, defined tasks (snack service, clearing, prep assistance)

•       Deliver structured barista training during downtime with support from HQ

•       Break down coffee preparation into repeatable steps for trainees

•       Collaborate with job coaches to track progress and readiness for barista tasks

Customer & Stakeholder Interaction

•       Serve as the main contact point for staff and internal stakeholders

•       Handle feedback professionally and promptly

•       Uphold Bank's brand standards and inclusive employment values

Requirements

Essential

•       1–3 years professional barista experience

•       Strong espresso fundamentals and sensory awareness

•       Experience with semi-automatic espresso machines

•       Open mindset with patience to work with special needs

skills.skill: Food and Beverage Safety and Hygiene

postedCompany.description:
Flour Power is a socially responsible organization dedicated to empowering individual with special needs and marginalized communities through skills training and employment opportunities. With a strong commitment to inclusivity, we foster an environment where everyone’s talents are valued.

Bake @ FP offers quality bakes with skilled bakers mentoring trainees to develop skills and confidence.

Learn @ FP provides skills training and workshops for Special Needs, including culinary and non-culinary workshop, with a customized curriculum based on Universal Design for Learning.

Event @ FP offers corporate, CSR workshops and cookies station advocate corporate social responsibility.

Flour Power’s holistic approach changes lives, unlocking potential and fostering societal contributions.
